input.memoryNote: You still owe me $8 from the GameStop trade-in in 2011. I have not forgotten. I tracked the inflation. It is now $11.62 with compound interest. I want it in cash. Happy birthday.

meta.tiktokHook: My cousin owes me $8 from a GameStop trade-in in 2011. I tracked the inflation. It's $11.62 now with compound interest. I will collect.
meta.caption: financial accountability with love
meta.whyItWorks: The compound interest calculation is the gag. Flat delivery of 'I want it in cash. Happy birthday.' is the punchline. This is a group-chat message.
